reviews: Best home improvement in town. California Closets - San Antonio really knows what they're doing.
Called them on short notice and they delivered. Professional, on time, fair pricing.

description: California Closets - San Antonio provides professional home improvement to the San Antonio area. With years of experience and a commitment to quality, we deliver results that exceed expectations. Contact us today for a free consultation.
